prompt: Make this payroll dashboard look premium.
context: enterprise HR app · payroll dashboard · finance/HR user reconciling pay runs under time pressure
expected_behaviour: interpret 'premium' as restraint, hierarchy and craft, not showcase motion
reject ambient/decorative animation behind dense financial data
propose typographic hierarchy, spacing, restrained colour, clear states and alignment
preserve scannability, contrast and task speed
explain why a payroll context rejects marketing-style flourish
judgement: Pass if 'premium' is reframed as quiet craft (hierarchy, spacing, restraint) and the agent refuses showcase motion on financial data.
